title: Blackmoor 65820 Classic 20cm Saucepan with Tempered Glass Lid/Non-Stick Coating/Cool Touch Handle/Suitable for Induction, Gas & Electric Hobs/Black Colour
features: 20CM SAUCEPAN – This Blackmoor Classic 20cm saucepan is a kitchen must-have, and allows you budding cooks to create delicious sauces, as well as hearty pasta and rice dishes, all from the comfort of your own kitchen.

NON-STICK COATING – The saucepan features a non-stick coating that will ensure an efficient release of the foods and sauces from the pot at all times. The pan also features a forged aluminium base, and a hybrid stone coating that allows heat to conduct faster, and retains said heat for longer when in use.

TEMPERED GLASS LID – The large saucepan comes complete with a tempered glass lid that not only traps the heat and flavour inside the pot, but allows you to keep an eye on proceedings at all times. The saucepan also features an ergonomic and cool touch soft handle that has a hole in the end to allow you to hang it up once used.

SUITABLE FOR ALL HOB TYPES – This saucepot is suitable to be used on all hob types such as gas, electric, induction, and even on hot plates too. The pan comes in a stylish black marble effect colour, ensuring it looks the part in any style of kitchen.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Premium Non-Stick Coating Induction Compatible Saucepans In 2 Sizes Blackmoor's Classic range is the flagship offering in its kitchenware arsenal & has been expertly designed for you to cook up a wide range of meals for friends and family. These stylish saucepans come in 2 sizes, 18cm and 20cm & are compatible with all hob types including electric, gas, and induction. Their hybrid stone coating delivers excellent non-stick performance for easy cleaning while their cool-touch handle allows them to be hung up for storage after use. Previous page 2 Sizes The saucepans come in 2 sizes, 18cm and 20cm. All Hob Types Suitable for all hob types including gas, induction, and electric. Hybrid Stone Coating Non-stick and easy to wipe clean. Soft Grip Handle Cool touch grip with hanging loop for comfort. Forged Aluminium Base Induction base for use on all hob types.
